heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 151910 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15191036:611., .Aug. 28, 1954, ch. 1036, § 1168 Stat. 894
